title: Phase 20.4 — GSC UI/API Reconciliation + Indexing Movement Audit

key_finding_1_clicks_exist.finding: QFINHUB HAS 1 ORGANIC CLICK in the last 28 days
key_finding_1_clicks_exist.significance: This is the FIRST CONFIRMED ORGANIC CLICK. It appeared in Qasem's 28-day GSC UI view (0.1% CTR). The 7-day window captured a 0-click period, but clicks ARE possible.

key_finding_2_discovery_cleanup.significance: Massive improvement. Google stopped discovering thin parameterized pages. This was the intended effect of V2 cleanup (noindexing formula scenarios, removing from sitemap).

key_finding_3_indexed_growth.significance: More real content pages being indexed. Internal links and content upgrades (Phase 17-20) are helping.

key_finding_4_performance_decline.finding: 7-day impressions declining (499→368 API, 418 UI), position worsening (33.8→40.1)
key_finding_4_performance_decline.diagnosis: Combination of honeymoon exit + discovered-not-indexed purge + thin pages stealing rankings + recent CTR fixes not yet recrawled
key_finding_4_performance_decline.verdict: EXPECTED NORMALIZATION — not a strategy failure

reconciliation_summary.both_sources_agree: 0 clicks in 7d, declining impressions, worsening position

risky_increase_audit.noindex: Likely intentional — V2 cleanup of formula scenarios. Verify URLs in next cycle.
risky_increase_audit.crawled_not_indexed: Probably thin duplicate tools/scenarios. Extract URLs for confirmation.
risky_increase_audit.404: 2 new broken URLs — identify and fix or 410.

performance_decline_5_factors: 1. Honeymoon exit — natural for new sites (HIGH impact)
2. Discovery purge — fewer pages being tested (MEDIUM, net positive)
3. Thin pages stealing rankings — 24/34 near-winners are dupes (HIGH impact)
4. 0 backlinks — no external trust signals (HIGH impact)
5. Recent CTR fixes not recrawled — temporary (MEDIUM impact)

decision.cron_gate: STILL CLOSED — await June 10 3 PM EEST run
decision.tiny_cleanup_test: HOLD — noindex increase needs URL audit first
decision.daily_monitoring: Add GSC UI/API reconciliation to daily run
decision.panic_change: DO NOT — trends are expected and net positive
